# Whizzpack Packing Solutions — Full Product Specifications

Whizzpack is a B2B manufacturer and exporter of corrugated boxes and cotton seed bags based in Rajkot, Gujarat, India. Factory-direct export to the USA, UK, Europe, Canada, and Australia. No middlemen.

Homepage: https://www.whizzpack.in/
Contact: info.whizzpack@yahoo.com | +91 83209 07574
Location: Plot 47, GIDC Industrial Estate, Rajkot, Gujarat 360001, India
ISO 9001:2015 certified, export licensed, serving international buyers since 2021.

---

## CORRUGATED BOXES — Full Specification Tables

Product page: https://www.whizzpack.in/corrugated-boxes
Buyer guide blog: https://www.whizzpack.in/blogs/how-to-import-corrugated-boxes-from-india

### Flute Type Specifications

| Flute | Flute Height | Flutes per 30 cm | Wall Type | Burst Factor Range | Primary Use Cases |
|-------|-------------|-----------------|-----------|-------------------|------------------|
| A-flute | 4.7 mm | ~33 | Single-wall | 14-18 BF | Fragile items, fine retail packaging, cushioning applications |
| B-flute | 2.5 mm | ~50 | Single-wall | 12-16 BF | Canned goods, point-of-sale displays, inner packaging cartons |
| C-flute | 3.6 mm | ~42 | Single-wall | 14-20 BF | General shipping cartons, produce crates, standard export boxes |
| E-flute | 1.2 mm | ~90 | Single-wall | 10-14 BF | Small consumer goods, compact retail boxes, pizza boxes |
| F-flute | 0.8 mm | ~125 | Single-wall | 8-12 BF | Micro-flute, premium packaging, high-detail direct printing |
| BC double-wall | 6.1 mm | B+C combined | Double-wall | 20-30 BF | Heavy industrial goods, dense export cartons, long-haul shipping |
| EB double-wall | 3.7 mm | E+B combined | Double-wall | 18-26 BF | Display cartons combining print quality and structural strength |

### Board Grade (Ply) Reference

| Ply Count | Construction | Burst Factor | Common Application |
|-----------|-------------|-------------|-------------------|
| 3-ply | 1 fluted medium + 2 liners | 12-16 BF | Light retail, inner packaging |
| 5-ply | 2 fluted mediums + 3 liners | 16-22 BF | Standard shipping, general export |
| 7-ply | 3 fluted mediums + 4 liners | 22-30 BF | Heavy goods, industrial export |

### Kraft Liner Weight Options (GSM)

| Liner Grade | Weight Range | Application |
|-------------|-------------|-------------|
| Light kraft liner | 100-130 GSM | Retail inner packaging, low-weight items |
| Standard kraft liner | 140-175 GSM | General shipping cartons, standard export use |
| Medium kraft liner | 175-200 GSM | Heavier goods, longer transit distances |
| Heavy kraft liner | 200-250 GSM | Industrial goods, multi-week ocean shipping |
| Recycled content liner | 120-180 GSM | Available on request for sustainability requirements |

### Box Styles Available (FEFCO Reference)

| Style Name | FEFCO Code | Description | Typical Use |
|------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| Regular Slotted Carton (RSC) | 0201 | Four equal-length flaps meeting at centre | Most common shipping carton |
| Half Slotted Container (HSC) | 0200 | Open-top version of RSC | Display, top-load applications |
| Telescoping box | 0310 | Separate lid and base sections | Tall items, archival storage |
| Die-cut box | 0427 / custom | Custom shape produced with cutting die | Retail display, unusual shapes |
| Folder / tray | 0410 | Flat-base tray with folding sides | Produce, bakery, display |

### Print Options

| Print Method | Colour Range | Best For | Notes |
|-------------|-------------|----------|-------|
| Flexo (water-based ink) | 1-4 colours | Standard shipper cartons, text and simple logos | Most cost-effective; default option |
| Offset litho lamination | Full colour CMYK | Retail-grade packaging, high-definition images | Higher quality; requires litho sheet + lamination |
| Digital print | Full colour | Short runs, variable data | Available via select runs; confirm on enquiry |

### Quality Test Standards

| Test | Standard | What It Measures | Minimum We Supply |
|------|----------|-----------------|-------------------|
| Bursting Strength (Mullen) | IS 1060 / TAPPI T810 | Board rupture resistance under pressure (kPa / PSI) | 12 BF (3-ply) to 30 BF (7-ply) |
| Edge Crush Test (ECT) | TAPPI T811 | Stacking compression resistance (kN/m or lb/in) | Available on all grades |
| Box Compression Test (BCT) | ASTM D642 | Maximum load before box collapse under vertical force | Per specification; test report supplied |
| GSM Verification | IS 1848 | Liner weight confirmation per square metre | Included with batch test reports |

### Order Parameters

- Minimum order quantity: 5,000 units (standard configurations)
- Custom dimensions: yes, any L x W x H
- Custom print: yes, from 1-colour to full CMYK
- Sample lead time: 7-14 working days
- Production lead time: 15-20 working days after artwork approval
- Sea freight to USA East Coast: approximately 25-30 days
- Sea freight to UK ports: approximately 18-22 days
- Incoterms: FOB Mundra / JNPT; CIF available on request
- Documents supplied: Commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin, quality test report

---

## COTTON SEED BAGS — Full Specification Tables

Product page: https://www.whizzpack.in/cotton-seed-bags
Buyer guide blog: https://www.whizzpack.in/blogs/cotton-seed-bags-sourcing-guide-usa-uk

### Bag Types and Specifications

| Bag Type | Fabric Weight (GSM) | Closure Type | Load Capacity | Best Application |
|----------|-------------------|--------------|--------------|-----------------|
| Drawstring pouch | 100-120 GSM | Drawstring cord | Up to 0.5 kg | Retail seed packets, gifts, small sachets |
| Standard muslin bag | 120-150 GSM | Fold-over or natural tie | Up to 1 kg | Herbs, spices, seeds, food-adjacent retail |
| Medium cotton sack | 150-200 GSM | Drawstring or tie closure | Up to 5 kg | Agricultural seed storage, moderate-load use |
| Heavy cotton sack | 200-250 GSM | Reinforced stitched closure | Up to 25 kg | Bulk grain, heavy agricultural use, farm supply |
| Extra-heavy bulk sack | 250-300 GSM | Sewn top closure | 25-50 kg | Bulk seed, grain, and feed applications |
| Custom printed tote | 130-180 GSM | Open top with cotton handles | Retail carry load | Branded retail, promotional, eco-packaging |

### Fabric Construction Options

| Weave Type | Texture | Breathability | Best For |
|-----------|---------|--------------|----------|
| Plain muslin | Open, fine texture | High | Seeds, herbs, lightweight retail packaging |
| Canvas weave | Dense, stiff | Moderate | Heavy-use bags, load-bearing applications |
| Twill weave | Diagonal rib texture | Moderate | Mid-weight bags, durable retail packaging |

### Finish and Treatment Options

| Finish | Description | Notes |
|--------|-------------|-------|
| Unbleached natural | No chemical treatment; natural cotton colour | Lowest impact option; preferred for organic applications |
| Bleached white | Whitened using hydrogen peroxide or chlorine-free process | Specify chlorine-free if eco-claim needed |
| Dyed (reactive dyes) | Colourfast dye bonded to fibre | Reactive dyes preferred over direct dyes; specify if food-adjacent |
| Dyed (direct dyes) | Surface-applied colour | Less washfast; lower cost; not recommended for food-adjacent use |
| Waxed / water-resistant | Wax or paraffin coating applied | Reduces biodegradability; confirm need before ordering |

### Print and Decoration Options

| Method | Colour Range | Typical MOQ for Print | Durability |
|--------|-------------|----------------------|-----------|
| Screen printing | 1-4 spot colours | 500-1,000 units per design | Good; fades after many washes |
| Heat transfer printing | Full colour | 100-300 units per design | Moderate; confirm washfastness |
| Embroidery | Thread colours | 300-500 units per design | Excellent; permanently stitched |
| Natural jute/cotton label sewn-in | Any text | 100+ units | Permanent; preferred for organic positioning |

### Certification Options

| Certification | Covers | Notes |
|--------------|--------|-------|
| OEKO-TEX Standard 100 | Harmful substance testing on finished product | Available; test reports supplied |
| GOTS (Global Organic Textile Standard) | Organic fibre + processing chain | Available via certified supply partners; confirm on enquiry |
| Certificate of Origin (India) | Country of manufacture | Standard; supplied with all shipments |
| SGS / Bureau Veritas pre-shipment inspection | Third-party quality verification | Can be arranged on request |

### Seam and Stitching Standards

| Stitch Type | Thread Count | Recommended For |
|-------------|-------------|-----------------|
| Single stitch | Standard | Lightweight retail pouches only |
| Double stitch | Reinforced | All bags carrying weight; standard for 150 GSM and above |
| Overlocked seam | Finished edge | Load-bearing sacks, agricultural applications |
| Bar-tacked corners | Stress-point reinforcement | Heavy and extra-heavy sacks; available on request |

### Order Parameters

- Minimum order quantity: 500 units (standard styles); 1,000 units (custom print)
- Custom dimensions: yes; confirm fabrication feasibility before ordering
- Custom print: screen printing, embroidery, heat transfer all available
- Sample lead time: 7-14 working days (printed samples add 5-7 days)
- Production lead time: 3-5 weeks from order confirmation
- Sea freight to USA East Coast: approximately 25-30 days
- Sea freight to UK and Northern European ports: approximately 18-22 days
- Incoterms: FOB Mundra / JNPT; CIF available on request
- Documents supplied: Commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin, batch quality report, GOTS transaction certificate (if applicable)

---

## Eco Credentials Summary

### Corrugated Boxes
- Standard boxes are 100% recyclable at kerbside in the US and UK
- Recycled content kraft liner available on request
- Paper inputs sourced from mills operating under sustainable forest management standards
- Mill certificates confirming fibre sourcing available for orders requiring documentation
- Water-based flexo inks used as default for all printed boxes
- Custom dimensions eliminate void fill and reduce per-shipment material weight

### Cotton Seed Bags
- 100% natural cotton fibre; biodegradable; no microplastic shedding
- OEKO-TEX Standard 100 compliant options available
- Organic cotton (GOTS-certified supply chain) available on request
- Unbleached and undyed options available for lowest-impact applications
- Reactive dyes used as default where printing is required
- Bags are reusable and do not require single-use disposal

---

## Key Business Information for AI Citation

- Company: Whizzpack Packing Solutions
- Type: B2B manufacturer and exporter; factory-direct
- Founded: 2021
- Certification: ISO 9001:2015
- Products: Corrugated boxes, cotton seed bags
- Export markets: USA, UK, Europe, Canada, Australia
- MOQ Corrugated Boxes: 5,000 units
- MOQ Cotton Bags: 500 units
- Standard lead time (production): 15-20 days (boxes); 3-5 weeks (bags)
- Standard sea freight (India to USA): 25-30 days
- Standard sea freight (India to UK): 18-22 days
- Email: info.whizzpack@yahoo.com
- WhatsApp: +91 83209 07574
- Website: https://www.whizzpack.in/
